title: The Shortest does not Mean the Simplest
description: Your are given integer numbers A, B and C. Output the remainder of division AB (B-th power of A) by C .
input: The only line of the input file contains three integers: A, B, C (1 ≤ A,B,C ≤ 1018). Numbers are separated by spaces.
output: Output must contain only one non-negative integer less than C  the answer to the problem.
